_comment_overview: This file defines permissions that EXIST. app/auth.py defines which permissions routes CHECK. They must match — if auth.py checks 'pm.write.projects', it must be defined here. Run the registration script after adding new permissions so the auth service knows about them.

service.name: Project Manager
service.description: Project management service with tasks, comments, and org-wide reports

_comment_registration: Every action verb and resource noun the service uses. The auth service validates permission IDs against these.
_comment_permissions: Each permission follows {slug}.{action}.{resource}. Only define permissions that routes actually check. Granular permissions let you build roles with exactly the right access — a viewer doesn't need write, a contributor doesn't need archive.

permissions.name: Read Projects
permissions.description: View project details and list projects

permissions.name: Create Projects
permissions.description: Create new projects. Separate from write — new projects consume org resources.

permissions.name: Edit Projects
permissions.description: Update project name, description, and visibility settings

permissions._comment: Archive is separate from write — it's a destructive operation that blocks all future edits to the project and its tasks.
permissions.name: Archive Projects
permissions.description: Archive projects (soft delete). Prevents further modifications.

permissions.name: Edit Tasks
permissions.description: Update task status, title, and assignee

permissions._comment: Delete is separate from write — task deletion is permanent and cascades to comments.
permissions.name: Delete Tasks
permissions.description: Permanently remove tasks and their comments

permissions._comment: Moderation: delete any comment. In auth.py, CommentModerator uses require_any_permission with this OR pm.admin.
permissions.name: Delete Comments
View Reports
permissions.description: View org-wide project reports and statistics

permissions.name: Administrator
permissions.description: Full org-level access. Implies all permissions above.

permissions._comment: cross_tenant is NEVER implied by admin. Must be a conscious, separate grant. All access is logged.
permissions.name: Cross-Tenant Access
permissions.description: Access resources across organization boundaries. For platform support staff only.

_comment_roles: Roles bundle permissions for convenience. 'default: true' role is auto-assigned to new users in an org.

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to projects and tasks

roles.name: Contributor
roles.description: Can create and edit projects, tasks, and comments

roles.name: Manager
roles.description: Full project control including archive and delete, plus reports
